name: 减速恢复
description: 每个己方回合结束时减少减速层数，归零时恢复移动范围
skillCode: var piece = context.rulePiece; if (!piece) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (piece.currentHp <= 0) { removeRuleById(piece.instanceId, 'rule-arthas-slow-restore'); return { success: false, message: '' }; } if (context.playerId !== piece.ownerPlayerId) return { success: false, message: '' }; var slowTag = piece.statusTags && piece.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'arthas-slow'; }); if (!slowTag) { removeRuleById(piece.instanceId, 'rule-arthas-slow-restore'); return { success: false, message: '' }; } slowTag.stacks = (slowTag.stacks || 1) - 1; if (slowTag.stacks > 0) { return { success: true, message: piece.name + '的减速还剩' + slowTag.stacks + '回合' }; } var moveRestored = slowTag.intensity || 1; piece.moveRange = (piece.moveRange || 1) + moveRestored; var si = piece.statusTags.indexOf(slowTag); piece.statusTags.splice(si, 1); removeRuleById(piece.instanceId, 'rule-arthas-slow-restore'); return { success: true, message: piece.name + '的减速解除，移动范围恢复至' + piece.moveRange };
